description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using node:latest as the default Docker image and node:8 for the build-project job. Define a cache that preserves the node_modules directory. Add a build-project job that runs the following script commands in order: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium; apt-get -yq install git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release"; it uses the node:8 image, stores artifacts (coverage/, doc/, dist/) for 1 day and captures coverage with the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Then add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs only on the master branch, uses the default node:latest image, runs ls -l; mkdir .public; mv coverage/ .public/coverage/; mv doc/ .public/doc/; mv .public public; and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact for 90 days.
